The '''second planet''' of the [[Calline system/Legends|Calline system]] was a tide-locked, atmosphere-less [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. The half of the planet facing the [[Star/Legends|sun]] was intensely hot and uninhabitable, while the part facing away from it was as cold as vacuum. Between these two halves was a thin habitable zone. At one time it was very seismically active, and lava caves riddled its crust. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] investigated it for a base c.[[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], but found [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] using it already as such. Because of their antipathy for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the smugglers might have been willing to join forces and turn over the base to the Rebels.
